description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof, surrounded by a lush green yard and several mature trees. The structure features clean, rectangular lines and a minimalist design, with large windows and open spaces visible from above. The house is set back from the street, with a pathway leading through a landscaped front garden to the main entrance. The rear of the property includes a private outdoor area, possibly a patio or terrace, partially enclosed by greenery. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, contrasting with darker window frames and roof elements. The overall layout emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring mature trees and open green spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the landscaped entry path, main entrance, and several trees lining the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, flat roof, and the arrangement of windows and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private backyard area, additional trees, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the boundary greenery, side windows, and driveway or access path.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a straight path, no porch, and surrounded by landscaped greenery
